title: The process of recycling glass bottles
key_features: The process is linear with five stages, from collection to new bottles.
Glass is sorted by colour before being washed and crushed.
Melting occurs at 1500°C, the only stated temperature.
The final stage moulds the molten glass into new bottles.
prompt: The diagram below shows how glass bottles are recycled. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
